title: DELETE with TRIGGER causes an assertion fault
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE fuzz_duckdb_t3(a INT, b INT, c INT);
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION fuzz_duckdb_t2del() RETURNS VOID AS $$ BEGIN DELETE FROM fuzz_duckdb_t3 WHERE a = (SELECT y FROM fuzz_duckdb_t2 WHERE y = OLD.y);
key_bug_features: DELETE with TRIGGER on WITHOUT ROWID tables
